tools.name: bridge_find_best_route
tools.description:
Use this when you need to bridge tokens between different blockchains. Returns ranked bridge routes with fees and timing in JSON.

1. routes: array of bridge options ranked by best value
2. bridgeProvider: which bridge protocol (Stargate, Across, Hop, Connext, etc.)
3. estimatedTime: expected bridge

tools.name: bridge_find_best_route
tools.description:
Use this when you need to bridge tokens between different blockchains. Returns ranked bridge routes with fees and timing in JSON. POST variant of bridge_find_best_route -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. routes: array of bridge options ranked by best value
2. bridgeProvi

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "bridge_find_best_route" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

2. bridgeProvi"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
